title: Elections ingest inventory
description: Declarative record of which (election_id, state, source_input) tuples have been ingested and validated. Re-runs trust this file and skip; operators delete an entry (or pass --force) to re-ingest deliberately. Replaces per-run corpus validation per CLAUDE.md §10 doctrine (Tier-B is local pre-emit, not CI-gated).

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Per-entry record of ingest completion with discrepancy summary; treated as the 'done and tested' marker for a state-election-source triple.

sources.description: Hand-authored inventory file — empty array per CLAUDE.md §12. Maintained by the ingest pipeline; entries reflect what was emitted, not a re-fetched upstream.

ingested.description: One entry per completed ingest. Identity = (election_id, state, source_input).

source_input.description: Adapter input identifier (e.g. tn_ae_panel_1971_2021). Stable across re-runs of the same input; bumped when a fundamentally new input replaces it.

ingested_at.description: Date the ingest completed. Date precision only — operator wall-clock is not provenance (CLAUDE.md §10).

discrepancy_summary.description: Headline numbers from the discrepancy report (full detail in .runtime/reports/). Lets a human scan the inventory and spot regressions without opening reports.
